mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals strengthening household demand and near-term earnings support, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when RSAFS growth is above its recent trend.
failure_condition: Reject if months with positive 3-month RSAFS growth do not produce higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than months with negative 3-month RSAFS growth, or if the walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in unemployment signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, causing investors to cut earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its 3-month prior level by more than 0.3 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered mean returns are not below untriggered mean returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is pinned near zero and inflation momentum is decelerating, discount-rate pressure remains low without forcing immediate tightening, supporting equity multiples and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS < 0.25 and 3-month CPIAUCSL growth crosses below its prior 6-month growth rate
failure_condition: Reject if this joint condition is followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 50% of triggered cases or if adding CPIAUCSL to FEDFUNDS does not improve out-of-sample directional accuracy.

mechanism_narrative: A downturn in industrial production indicates weakening real activity and lower operating leverage for cyclical firms, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if observations after INDPRO 3-month growth crosses below zero have average 20-day S&P 500 returns greater than the unconditional average or if the sign accuracy is below 50% across triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts signal improving credit transmission, construction activity, and durable-goods demand, which lifts cyclical earnings expectations and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its trailing 6-month maximum
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST breakouts above the trailing 6-month maximum are not followed by higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-breakout months, or if the effect reverses after controlling for RSAFS.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth accompanied by a falling unemployment rate confirms broad labor-market improvement, raising expected household income and corporate revenues, and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down condition does not outperform either single-series condition in out-of-sample 20-day return prediction, or if its hit rate is below the unconditional positive rate.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer inflation while the policy rate remains near zero compresses real purchasing power and raises future tightening risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS < 0.25 and 3-month CPIAUCSL annualized growth crosses above 4
regime_hint: zero lower bound with inflation pressure
failure_condition: Reject if triggered inflation-acceleration episodes have nonnegative average 5-day S&P 500 returns or if CPIAUCSL acceleration has no incremental negative coefficient when interacted with FEDFUNDS < 0.25.

mechanism_narrative: A negative quarterly growth signal in real GDP marks a broad contraction in aggregate demand and expected earnings, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if negative GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean return.
